positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene composition featuring abstract flora and fauna. The central subject is a stylized grouping of neon-colored bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate, stylized forest creatures (such as stylized fox silhouettes and small abstract woodland spirits). The mood is magical and serene. Use a highly contrasting, clean silhouette style with sharp edges and strong negative space. The color palette should emphasize deep indigo and cyan night sky tones contrasted sharply with bright magenta, electric lime green, and glowing gold accents. Ideal for a t-shirt print with clean lines and vector aesthetic. Minimalist composition, high detail, centered layout, clean lines, art deco influences, vaporwave forest aesthetic.
